name: Veritate 800M (RoPE + MTP, FineWeb-Edu)
description: Byte-level decoder (vocab=256) at h=1536 L=28 ffn=6144 heads=24, RoPE positional encoding, 4-byte multi-token-prediction (MTP) head. Trained from scratch on FineWeb-Edu (~211 GB) for ~16B tokens (Chinchilla-optimal). Optimization stack: single-forward path, foreach AdamW, prefetched data loader, bf16 autocast, NaN-skip guard, bf16-native RMSNorm. Wall-clock ~24-26 days on M3 Ultra.
